message: Hey, long time no see. How have you been?
I'm amazed. That’s my line, isn’t it?
Look at me, I've been working out like crazy and I'm in great shape.
It feels stupid to have been running around like that.
Hey, the food here is also delicious.
Even though it’s just a private party at the director's house, everyone is dressed up.
Film industry personnel are gathered. It seems like they can't truly enjoy themselves since the shoot has been canceled.
With a face that looks like nothing happened, they're drinking from a glass and chatting with a nearby guest.
He looks surprisingly healthy and has good skin, hard to believe he was under house arrest until just recently.
He looks a lot healthier than me. Does Guy have no stress?
He probably has never experienced having a knife held to him. He seems unable to hide his agitation.
His body still feels stiff from fear.
It was right after the party; he got into trouble with the baseball team and was put under house arrest.
I see, that was it. You wouldn't run off again after this, would you?
Come on, stop with the bad jokes.
I must have caused you a lot of trouble, huh? I’m sorry.
Thanks. I’m glad you're my friend.
I feel bad for what I did to you. I’ll make it up to you, I promise.
I’m at my wit's end. Why did she target me? You must know something!
Guy is tight-lipped, so he won't tell.
Hey, I'm the victim here!? I think I'm in a position to ask for a reason.
If you know something, just tell me.
Though you might also have circumstances that prevent you from saying anything.
So, how about we talk properly on another occasion?
So you really want me to tell you now.
Why do I have to be resented by Meryl?
I never would have guessed that Meryl and Cindy were mother and daughter.
Aren't you the type who likes being alone?
I heard Ginny is still missing.
Maybe that's why you look a bit worn out.
I wouldn't be surprised if that's true.
...was just watching me when I was attacked,
and couldn't move because he was so shocked.
Could be, maybe there’s something more to it.
He might think I'm involved in Ginny's case.
The relationship between me and him is pretty delicate, you know.
I already didn't like him from the start.
I think we're pretty different types, but thinking there's something going on because of Ginny might be overthinking it.
You can say that because you don't know him well.
That guy thinks I'm involved in Ginny's incident.
The director has really aged a bit since I last saw him.
He must have had a lot going on with the movie and Cindy.
Seems like a lot happened while I was away. You must have had it rough too, huh?
The director had a rough time too.
But that's not something I should be saying.
The one Meryl was actually going after was,
I got mad at the director for his wishy-washy attitude. But he was so drunk that he accidentally attacked me.
Isn't that a bit off? Mistaking Guy for the director is a stretch.
Come on, when a person is drunk, you can't predict how they'll act.
Meryl's in serious trouble. She's gone crazy from the drink.
is doing fine, huh? I thought he'd be a bit more gloomy.
Look, she was really struggling. It was really tough on her because of you.
Really? When I saw her face, it was like she completely forgot about all the mess up to that point and had a carefree expression.
I'm talking about you; you've probably caused her quite a bit of trouble.
I wouldn't say it was a bother, but she really was pitiful, you know? From now on, make sure to take care of her.
Alright, alright, I'll take it to heart.
I'll make it up to you.
I got saved by him earlier.
You must have really understood the depth of his love, right?
But, hasn't he changed a bit since we last met?
Yeah. I kinda feel that way.
I can't believe he would do something so reckless.
He seems less energetic than when I last saw him. It’s like he's being chased by something.
It might just be an illusion.
I don’t really know him well, so it could just be my imagination.
But he definitely feels different from when I met him before.
If only you had been there to back me up.
Hey, asking an actress to do that is a bit harsh, don’t you think? Plus, it’d be bad if she got hurt.
Tch, we were lovers in the movie, but you’re cold.
After all, it’s just a relationship in the role. Reality isn’t that sweet.
I don't remember doing anything to be attacked by her. I really can't think of any other reason for this mistake, can you?
you know the reason, right? You could tell me.
Why do I have to be put through this when I'm such a well-behaved person?
! I think it’s about time you tell me what's going on.
Well, the truth is, to make a long story short, Meryl's daughter was murdered, and the culprit was reported to be you, Guy, so she came to seek revenge.
Cut out your weird stories. Meryl is single, and she doesn't have a daughter.
No way, could Cindy be her daughter?
That's exactly right. Just when she finally gets to call herself a mother, Cindy gets killed and she's in complete shock.
Is it really okay to tell someone something like this?
I'd prefer if you kept it quiet until it goes public.
Still, I can't believe Meryl and Cindy were mother and daughter.
I find that hard to believe.
I think you already know, but I didn't do it.
I know that without being told. First off, you were under house arrest, right?
Why the hell would I be the criminal? The media are all idiots.
In just a short time, two celebrities have died, and New York has become an even more dangerous city.
Yeah, lately there have been a lot of unpleasant incidents nearby.
See, I should have just been an ordinary businessman. Being a detective is a shady business that gets you wrapped up in weird stuff.
You should just quit being a detective.
So, Meryl thought I was a murderer and attacked me?
In the end, I was misunderstood by Meryl and almost got my revenge taken on me.
Yeah, that's how it turned out.
You better clear up Meryl's misunderstanding quickly. I can't handle being targeted again.
What’s up with this key? When did you start carrying a key like this?
I have no clue whose key this is.
